scripts.build: slidev build && slidev build pitch.md --base /pitch/ --out dist/pitch && slidev build slides-en.md --base /en/ --out dist/en && slidev build pitch-en.md --base /en/pitch/ --out dist/en/pitch
scripts.build:ru: slidev build && slidev build pitch.md --base /pitch/ --out dist/pitch
scripts.build:en: slidev build slides-en.md --base /en/ --out dist/en && slidev build pitch-en.md --base /en/pitch/ --out dist/en/pitch
